description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:16 Docker image. Define a single job named pages that runs in the default test stage and only triggers when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME equals $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH. The job caches the node_modules/ directory, then executes npm update, npm install -g brunch, and brunch build --production. Finally, it publishes the generated public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. No additional services are required.
